description: Create comprehensive 4-panel figure comparing AGK and CERK: domain architecture, evidence types, substrate specificity, and functional properties
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(2, 2, figsize=(16, 14))
fig.suptitle("AGK Ceramide Kinase Activity (GO:0001729) — Evidence Assessment", 
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

# === Panel A: Domain Architecture Comparison ===
ax = axes[0, 0]
ax.set_title("A. Domain Architecture: AGK vs CERK", fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)

# AGK
ax.broken_barh([(0, 422)], (3.5, 0.8), facecolors='lightgray', edgecolors='black', linewidth=1)
ax.broken_barh([(58, 142)], (3.5, 0.8), facecolors='#4CAF50', edgecolors='black', linewidth=1.5)
ax.broken_barh([(310, 112)], (3.5, 0.8), facecolors='#FF9800', edgecolors='black', linewidth=1.5)
ax.broken_barh([(1, 30)], (3.5, 0.8), facecolors='#9E9E9E', edgecolors='black', linewidth=1)
ax.text(129, 3.9, 'DAGKc', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='white')
ax.text(366, 3.9, 'AGK_C', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold')
ax.text(-15, 3.9, 'AGK', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax.text(15, 4.4, 'MTS', ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=8, fontstyle='italic')

# CERK
ax.broken_barh([(0, 537)], (2.0, 0.8), facecolors='lightgray', edgecolors='black', linewidth=1)
ax.broken_barh([(1, 125)], (2.0, 0.8), facecolors='#2196F3', edgecolors='black', linewidth=1.5)
ax.broken_barh([(128, 151)], (2.0, 0.8), facecolors='#4CAF50', edgecolors='black', linewidth=1.5)
ax.broken_barh([(390, 147)], (2.0, 0.8), facecolors='#E91E63', edgecolors='black', linewidth=1.5)
ax.text(63, 2.4, 'PH', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='white')
ax.text(203, 2.4, 'DAGKc', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='white')
ax.text(463, 2.4, 'CERK_C', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='white')
ax.text(-15, 2.4, 'CERK', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

ax.set_xlim(-60, 570)
ax.set_ylim(1.5, 5.0)
ax.set_xlabel('Residue position', fontsize=9)
ax.set_yticks([])

legend_patches = [
    mpatches.Patch(color='#4CAF50', label='DAGKc (shared)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#2196F3', label='PH domain (CERK only)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#FF9800', label='AGK_C (AGK only)'),
    mpatches.Patch(color='#E91E63', label='CERK_C (CERK only)'),
]
ax.legend(handles=legend_patches, fontsize=8, loc='upper right')

# === Panel B: Evidence Type Summary ===
ax = axes[0, 1]
ax.set_title("B. Evidence Code Comparison for GO:0001729", fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)

evidence_types = ['IDA\n(Direct Assay)', 'EXP\n(Experiment)', 'ISS\n(Seq Sim)', 'IBA\n(Phylogenetic)', 'IEA\n(Electronic)']
agk_counts = [0, 0, 1, 1, 1]
cerk_counts = [4, 1, 0, 1, 1]

x = np.arange(len(evidence_types))
width = 0.35
bars1 = ax.bar(x - width/2, agk_counts, width, label='AGK', color='#FF5722', alpha=0.8, edgecolor='black')
bars2 = ax.bar(x + width/2, cerk_counts, width, label='CERK', color='#2196F3', alpha=0.8, edgecolor='black')
ax.set_xticks(x)
ax.set_xticklabels(evidence_types, fontsize=8)
ax.set_ylabel('Number of annotations')
ax.legend()
ax.set_ylim(0, 5.5)

# Add labels
for bar in bars1:
    if bar.get_height() > 0:
        ax.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2., bar.get_height() + 0.1, 
                int(bar.get_height()), ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=9)
for bar in bars2:
    if bar.get_height() > 0:
        ax.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2., bar.get_height() + 0.1, 
                int(bar.get_height()), ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=9)

ax.axhline(y=0, color='black', linewidth=0.5)
ax.text(0.02, 0.95, 'AGK: 0 direct experimental\nCERK: 5 direct experimental', 
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=8, va='top',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.8))

# === Panel C: Substrate Specificity ===
ax = axes[1, 0]
ax.set_title("C. AGK Substrate Specificity (Waggoner 2004)", fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)

substrates = ['DAG\n(diacylglycerol)', 'Ceramide', 'MAG\n(monoacylglycerol)', 'Sphingosine']
# Relative activity based on Waggoner 2004 findings
vmax_relative = [1.0, 0.5, 0.7, 0.0]  # Approximate relative Vmax
km_relative = [1.0, 1.0, 0.8, 0.0]  # Approximate relative affinity

colors = ['#4CAF50', '#FF9800', '#4CAF50', '#F44336']
bars = ax.bar(substrates, vmax_relative, color=colors, edgecolor='black', alpha=0.8)
ax.set_ylabel('Relative Vmax (DAG = 1.0)')
ax.set_ylim(0, 1.3)
ax.axhline(y=0, color='black', linewidth=0.5)

# Add note
ax.text(0.02, 0.95, 'Higher Vmax for DAG than ceramide\n→ "primarily a diacylglycerol kinase"\n\nVan Overloop 2006: Could NOT\nreplicate ceramide activity', 
        transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=8, va='top',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', alpha=0.8))

# === Panel D: Key Properties Comparison ===
ax = axes[1, 1]
ax.set_title("D. Functional Properties: AGK vs CERK", fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)
ax.axis('off')

table_data = [
    ['Property', 'AGK', 'CERK'],
    ['Primary activity', 'Acylglycerol kinase', 'Ceramide kinase'],
    ['EC number', '2.7.1.94 / 2.7.1.107', '2.7.1.138'],
    ['Main products', 'LPA, PA', 'Ceramide-1-P'],
    ['Localization', 'Mito. inner membrane', 'Plasma membrane/Golgi'],
    ['Non-kinase role', 'TIM22 complex subunit', 'None known'],
    ['PH domain', 'ABSENT', 'PRESENT'],
    ['Disease', 'Sengers syndrome', 'None (OMIM)'],
    ['PANTHER subfamily', 'SF31 (AGK)', 'SF25 (CERK)'],
    ['DAGKc identity', '34% to CERK', 'Reference'],
    ['Cer kinase evidence', 'ISS/IBA/IEA only', 'IDA + EXP'],
]

table = ax.table(cellText=table_data, loc='center', cellLoc='center',
                 colWidths=[0.3, 0.35, 0.35])
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(8.5)
table.scale(1, 1.6)

# Style header row
for j in range(3):
    table[0, j].set_facecolor('#37474F')
    table[0, j].set_text_props(color='white', fontweight='bold')

# Highlight key rows
for i in [1, 10]:
    for j in range(3):
        table[i, j].set_facecolor('#FFF9C4')

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.96])
plt.savefig('agk_cerk_evidence_assessment.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved.")
